items.title: AWS Releases Next Generation of Amazon OpenSearch Serverless

items.title: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication Across Millions of Domains
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication Across Millions of Domains. Pinterest introduced MIQPS, a URL normalization system that identifies which query parameters affect page identity using rendered content fingerprints.

items.title: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ
items.summaryShort: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ. InfoQ celebrates its 20th anniversary.

items.title: Why Apple's slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
items.summaryShort: Why Apple's slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart. Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

items.title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing' valuation tricks
items.summaryShort: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing' valuation tricks. Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.

items.title: As OpenAI files for IPO, Sam Altman's eye-scanning company is doing layoffs, report says
items.summaryShort: As OpenAI files for IPO, Sam Altman's eye-scanning company is doing layoffs, report says. Tools for Humanity, Sam Altman's identity verification company, is reportedly struggling to generate revenue and will downsize its staff.
